purpose: Pure localStorage-based library for persisting ever-known peer pubkeys. Forms the second half of the walled-garden whitelist alongside live MLS group membership. No React, no IDB, no NDK dependencies.

public_api.name: loadKnownPeers
public_api.description: Reads lp_knownPeers_v1 from localStorage and returns a frozen Set of lowercase hex pubkeys.

public_api.name: rememberKnownPeer
public_api.description: Lowercases and persists a single peer hex. Idempotent. Silent no-op on empty string or falsy input.

public_api.name: rememberKnownPeers
public_api.description: Bulk-adds multiple peer hexes in a single localStorage write. Filters empty strings.

public_api.name: isKnownPeer
public_api.description: Returns true if the peer (case-insensitive) is in lp_knownPeers_v1.

public_api.name: knownPeersMigrationComplete
public_api.description: Returns true when lp_knownPeersMigrated_v2 is set in localStorage.
